detaileddescription.para: This page provides detailed documentation for the various particle classes used in the exp_mc20 event. These classes inherit from particle_template and define the specific properties and behaviors of each particle type.

sect1.title: Top
sect1.para: The top class represents a top quark in the event.

listitem.para: top(): Initializes the particle type to "top" and defines the data leaves to be read from the input tree.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the top particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the top particle's properties from the input data.

sect1.title: Child
sect1.para: The child class represents a decay product of a top quark.

listitem.para: child(): Initializes the particle type to "child" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the child particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the child particle's properties from the input data.

sect1.title: Physics Detector
sect1.para: The physics_detector class represents a particle reconstructed at the detector level, with links to the truth level.

listitem.para: physics_detector(): Initializes the particle type to "physdet" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the physics_detector particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the physics_detector particle's properties from the input data.
top_index: A vector of indices of the associated top quarks.
parton: The true flavor of the particle.

sect1.title: Physics Truth
sect1.para: The physics_truth class represents a particle at the truth level.

listitem.para: physics_truth(): Initializes the particle type to "phystru" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the physics_truth particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the physics_truth particle's properties from the input data.
top_index: A vector of indices of the associated top quarks.
parton: The parton truth label.
type: The type of the particle.

sect1.title: Jet
sect1.para: The jet class represents a reconstructed jet.

listitem.para: jet(): Initializes the particle type to "jet" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the jet particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the jet particle's properties from the input data.
flav: The truth flavor of the jet.

sect1.title: Electron
sect1.para: The electron class represents a reconstructed electron.

listitem.para: electron(): Initializes the particle type to "el" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the electron particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the electron particle's properties from the input data.
is_tight: A boolean flag indicating if the electron passes the tight selection criteria.
d0sig: The transverse impact parameter significance.
delta_z0: The longitudinal impact parameter.
true_type: The truth type of the electron.
true_origin: The truth origin of the electron.

sect1.title: Muon
sect1.para: The muon class represents a reconstructed muon.

listitem.para: muon(): Initializes the particle type to "mu" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the muon particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the muon particle's properties from the input data.
is_tight: A boolean flag indicating if the muon passes the tight selection criteria.
d0sig: The transverse impact parameter significance.
delta_z0: The longitudinal impact parameter.
true_type: The truth type of the muon.
true_origin: The truth origin of the muon.
